title: [Renseikai] Student Classification Column – Lesson Calendar Student Session List – Student with Classification Value – Column visible with correct value
description: AC 01.2 — CRUD Testing — Confirms the Student Classification column is present in the Lesson Calendar Student Session list and displays the student's classification value.
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. At least one student session is visible in the Lesson Calendar for a student whose Student Classification = 季節講習生 (seasonal).
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to the Lesson Calendar page in Salesforce"
2. "Locate a date with a student session for a student with Student Classification = 季節講習生"
3. "Open or expand the Student Session list for that entry"
4. "Read the Student Classification column value for that student"
steps_result:
1. "Lesson Calendar page loads"
2. "The student session entry is visible on the calendar"
3. "Student Session list is displayed"
4. "The cell shows 季節講習生"

title: [Renseikai] Student Classification Column – Lesson Calendar Student Session List – Student with Null Classification – Column displays blank
description: AC 01.2 — Negative Testing — Confirms the Student Classification column shows a blank cell in the Lesson Calendar when a student's classification is null.
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. At least one student session is visible in the Lesson Calendar for a student whose Student Classification is null.
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to the Lesson Calendar page"
2. "Locate a student session for a student with no Student Classification set"
3. "Open or expand the Student Session list"
4. "Read the Student Classification column value for that student"
steps_result:
1. "Lesson Calendar page loads"
2. "The student session entry is visible"
3. "Student Session list is displayed"
4. "The cell is blank — no dash, no N/A, no placeholder text"

title: [Renseikai] Lesson Calendar Student List Filter – Student Classification – Filter Presence – Filter appears below Type filter in left panel
description: AC 02.3 — CRUD Testing — Confirms the Student Classification filter is present in the Lesson Calendar Student List Filter (left panel) and positioned directly below the Type filter.
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. The Lesson Calendar page is accessible and has student sessions to display.
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to the Lesson Calendar page"
2. "Open the Student List Filter panel on the left side"
3. "Observe the filter fields in the panel"
4. "Identify the position of the Student Classification filter relative to the Type filter"
steps_result:
1. "Lesson Calendar page loads"
2. "Student List Filter panel opens with multiple filter fields"
3. "Filter fields are visible"
4. "The Student Classification multi-select filter field appears directly below the Type filter"

title: [Renseikai] Lesson Calendar Student List Filter – Student Classification – Default State – All students shown when no classification selected
description: AC 02.3 — Decision Table — Confirms that with no Student Classification value selected, sessions for all classification types remain visible.
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. Lesson Calendar has visible sessions for 在籍生, 元在籍生, 問合生, 季節講習生, and null. Student List Filter panel open with no classification selected.
steps_actions:
1. "Open the Lesson Calendar page"
2. "Open the Student List Filter panel"
3. "Confirm the Student Classification filter has no value selected"
4. "Apply the filter (or confirm the default view)"
steps_result:
1. "Lesson Calendar loads showing student sessions"
2. "Filter panel opens"
3. "Student Classification filter is empty"
4. "Student sessions for all classification types (在籍生, 元在籍生, 問合生, 季節講習生, and null) remain visible"

title: [Renseikai] Lesson Calendar Student List Filter – Student Classification – Single Value Selected – Only matching students shown
description: AC 02.3 — Decision Table, Equivalence Partitioning — Confirms that selecting one classification value hides sessions for all other classification types.
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. Lesson Calendar has visible sessions for 在籍生 and 問合生. Student List Filter panel is open.
steps_actions:
1. "Open the Student List Filter panel in the Lesson Calendar"
2. "Select 在籍生 in the Student Classification filter"
3. "Apply the filter"
steps_result:
1. "Filter panel opens"
2. "在籍生 is selected in the filter"
3. "The calendar shows only sessions for students with Student Classification = 在籍生; sessions for 問合生, 元在籍生, 季節講習生, or null are hidden"

title: [Renseikai] Lesson Calendar Student List Filter – Student Classification – Two Values Selected – OR logic returns students of both types
description: AC 02.3 — Decision Table — Confirms that selecting two classification values shows sessions for students matching either value (OR logic).
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. Lesson Calendar has visible sessions for 在籍生, 問合生, and 元在籍生. Student List Filter panel is open.
steps_actions:
1. "Open the Student List Filter panel in the Lesson Calendar"
2. "Select 在籍生 in the Student Classification filter"
3. "Also select 問合生 in the same filter"
4. "Apply the filter"
steps_result:
1. "Filter panel opens"
2. "在籍生 is selected"
3. "Both 在籍生 and 問合生 are shown as selected"
4. "The calendar shows sessions for 在籍生 AND sessions for 問合生; sessions for 元在籍生 or 季節講習生 are hidden"
